demonstration_case: Khandwa district — discharge to river (discharge_inland) — full set of 8 treatment trains

site_row_used.choice: Indirasagar Dam (regions.id=27), Khandwa district, Narmada mainstem

site_row_selection_note: User selected Indirasagar Dam (region 27) as the Khandwa site row (Strahler 7, representative of Narmada mainstem hydrology).
mortakka_anomaly_note: The alternative Khandwa WQ station Mortakka (region 39) was NOT used: its stream_order_strahler=1 and nat_discharge_cms=0.427 are anomalous against its drainage_area_km2=67,184 (a likely HydroRIVERS snap error). Indirasagar (Strahler 7) avoids that anomaly.

influent_used.choice: Representative 'Domestic sewage (blackwater mix)' profile (water_type_profiles, source_id 9) — provisional/representative, NOT measured at site
influent_used.rationale: 'Discharge to river' means treating collected domestic sewage before discharge; canonical sewage profile gives a meaningful treatment demand and activates C1 treatment_fit.
